Mpl-finance

# reference:

[https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIFBTFgFpoJ-2Qq6GFW-knNyAR9PcOwPw](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIFBTFgFpoJ-2Qq6GFW-knNyAR9PcOwPw)

[https://github.com/Roibal/Cryptocurrency-Trading-Bots-Python-Beginner-Advance](https://github.com/Roibal/Cryptocurrency-Trading-Bots-Python-Beginner-Advance)  
[https://github.com/danistefanovic/build-your-own-x/issues/66](https://github.com/danistefanovic/build-your-own-x/issues/66)

Analyzing Cryptocurrency Markets Using Python [https://blog.patricktriest.com/analyzing-cryptocurrencies-python/](https://blog.patricktriest.com/analyzing-cryptocurrencies-python/)

ccxt on github has most of the major exchanges incorperated  
[https://github.com/ccxt/ccxt](https://github.com/ccxt/ccxt)

[http://gbeced.github.io/pyalgotrade/](http://gbeced.github.io/pyalgotrade/)

Some major exchanges have Python wrappers for their APIs.I use this one for Binance. If you know what you're doing, it shouldn't be too hard to write your own bot.  
[https://github.com/sammchardy/python-binance](https://github.com/sammchardy/python-binance)

How to Build a Crypto Trading Bot  
[https://www.devteam.space/blog/how-to-build-a-crypto-trading-bot/](https://www.devteam.space/blog/how-to-build-a-crypto-trading-bot/)

### **Best open source crypto bots:**

* [Gekko](https://gekko.wizb.it/)  
* [Zenbot](https://github.com/DeviaVir/zenbot)

Making a simple Raspberry Pi Bitcoin/Ethereum trading bot [https://blog.haschek.at/post/feb62](https://blog.haschek.at/post/feb62)

Predicting Cryptocurrency Prices With Deep Learning  https://dashee87.github.io/deep learning/python/predicting-cryptocurrency-prices-with-deep-learning/

[https://www.quantopian.com/home](https://www.quantopian.com/home)

AnalysisInvestment Opinion5 Investment Tactics You Need in Your Cryptocurrency Portfolio [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XF7mgsr7mc8CbtghsnM9g\_Iu2dw1m48WNSDqLLuJFUM/edit](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XF7mgsr7mc8CbtghsnM9g_Iu2dw1m48WNSDqLLuJFUM/edit)
